that Medicare covers the claimed services, including determining whether they are

20.1.2 - Determination of Coverage 
(Rev. 208, Issued: 04-22-15, Effective: 01-01-15, Implementation: 05-11-15) 

The Medicare contractor’s decision on whether care is reasonable and necessary is based 
on information reflected in the home health plan of care, the OASIS as required by 42 
CFR 484.55 or a medical record of the individual patient. Medicare
